title: Avocado Sushi Rolls with Venezuelan Twist
description: A fusion of Venezuelan flavors with the classic Japanese sushi rolls, featuring fresh avocado and a hint of Venezuelan spices.

ingredients.name: Short-grain Japanese rice
ingredients.notes: preferably Japanese Koshihikari or Akita Komachi

instructions: Prepare the sushi rice according to package instructions.
Cut the avocado slices into thin strips.
Prepare the Venezuelan mojo sauce, if using.
Cut the sushi nori sheets into desired sizes.
Assemble the sushi rolls with the prepared ingredients.
Top with crumbled Venezuelan cheese and chopped cilantro.
Serve immediately, with or without Venezuelan mojo sauce.
